text.title: Security Testing Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Security Testing end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-scan-types
step.action: List enabled scan types and their current schedules.

step.name: wire-sast-to-pr
step.action: Add SAST job to PR workflow; block on high/critical.

step.name: wire-sca-to-build
step.action: Add SCA scan to build workflow; fail on critical CVE in prod dependency.

step.name: wire-secrets-everywhere
step.action: Install pre-commit hook + add CI scan with same ruleset.

step.name: schedule-dast-nightly
step.action: Configure nightly DAST against staging URL.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Aggregate latest scan-run-id per scan type; emit security-testing report JSON.
